title: Covers
description: Songs previously recorded by another artist

title: Shorties
description: Songs that are less than 2 minutes long

title: Who Got Time For That?
description: Songs longer than 6 minutes (DNC)

title: Goddammit, Caleb
description: Songs from an artist you've never heard of before. NOT just someone you've never listened to before but a name that is completely new to you.  (DNC)

title: Guilty Pleasures
description: Songs you genuinely love, but you're a little embarassed to like

title: C-A-M-P-F-I-R-E-S-O-N-G Song
description: Songs perfect for toasting around a campfire, maybe in a cabin, who knows? That's your thing. Alternatively, songs that are great at an outdoor party.  (DNC)

title: Happy Pride Month!
description: Songs by LGBTQIA+ artists

title: Easy Week
description: Anything! Your favorite songs! No digging for weird themes. Just the songs you're been wanting to share.

title: Beach Vibes
description: Songs to listen to on the beach

title: Name Drop
description: Songs with a person's name in the title

title: Brevity
description: Songs with a single-word title (No articles allowed)

title: The Genuine Articles
description: Songs that start with an article

title: 1960s
description: Songs released in the 1960s

title: 1970s
description: Songs released in the 1970s

title: 1980s
description: Songs released in the 1980s

title: 1990s
description: Songs released in the 1990s

title: 2000s
description: Songs released in the 2000s

title: 2010s
description: Songs released in the 2010s

title: 2020's
description: Songs released in the 2020's.

title: The Amazing Technicolor Playlist
description: Songs that have a color in the title

title: Hear Me Out
description: Songs that are often mocked but you enjoy unironically

title: Mmm... Music
description: Songs with a food in the title (Drinks are ok, too)

title: A Bad Case of Earworms
description: Songs you can't get out of your head

title: Music Videos
description: Submit a great music video, Caleb will make and share a YouTube playlist based on the submissions, and we will vote on best music video (song playlist available if the music videos don't work for you or your schedule).

title: A Monster Bash
description: Songs that have a monster in the title (The word monster is acceptable. If it would be used as a SCARY Halloween decoration, I'll count it.)

title: Parlez-vous?
description: Songs not in English (At least majority non-English. Some English is fine)

title: It's About Family
description: Songs with a family member in the title (i.e. mother, brother, father, cousin, grandmother)

title: An Adequate Substitute for Sex Ed
description: Songs about getting down and dirty and doing the deed

title: Lend Me Your Ear
description: Songs with a body part in the title

title: Thanks, Mom and Dad
description: Songs that you heard from your parents or listen to with your children.

title: Featuring
description: Songs that feature a guest artist (not a sample)

title: That's a Christmas to Me
description: Unconventional Christmas song or Christmas songs from unexpected artists

title: Music League Christmas Party
description: Songs that make you dance (Do not have to be holiday songs)

title: Counting Down to the New Year
description: Songs with a number in the title (Numeral or written out)

title: Rapper's Delight
description: Rap or Hip-hop songs

title: Boot Scootin' Boogies
description: Country/Western songs

title: Skanking in the Streets (But Not Like That)
description: Ska or punk songs

title: Ya Like Jazz?
description: Jazz, blues, soul, or gospel songs

title: Digital Getdown
description: Trap, electronica, house, EDM, or dubstep songs

title: Osmium
description: Metal, emo, and hard rock songs (Get it? Osmium? The densest metal on Earth?)

title: Hear It from the Cheap Seats
description: Songs from musicals or operas

title: Level Clear!
description: Music from or inspired by video games

title: Cloudy with a Chance of... Music?
description: Songs that have an aspect of weather (e.g. rain, snow, heat, etc. or just weather) in the title

title: Boy Bands / Girl Groups
description: Songs from boy bands or girl groups (Groups of 2 or more of the same gender who do not play their own instruments)

title: Just Asking
description: Songs with a question for the title (punctuation optional)

title: Songs That Get White People Turnt
description: Songs that get you AMPED

title: Is That What We're Calling the Album?
description: Songs that are also the title of the album they were originally released on

title: For the Birds
description: Songs with an animal in the title

title: One of the Good Ones
description: Songs that you like by artists that you definitely don't

title: Better than the Original
description: Cover songs that you believe are better than the original (You're allowed to be wrong)

title: Magical Musical History Tour
description: Songs about historical events or people of note or that have one in the title

title: Interrobangers
description: Songs with punctuation in the title

title: The Other Attempts
description: Other songs by one-hit wonders than their biggest hit

title: It's About Time
description: Songs with a measurement of time in the title (The word time is acceptable)

title: Setting the Mood... To Do Drugs
description: Songs to get high/drunk to

title: Tossed Salad and Scrambled Eggs
description: Songs used as the opening theme or during the credits of a TV show or anime

title: Parenthetically Speaking
description: Songs that include a parenthetical (Other than a featuring or version)

title: Takes Me Back
description: Songs you used to listen to all the time 5+ years ago but haven't really listened to since

title: Songs from the Soapbox
description: Songs that promote activism or were written as a commentary on societal or political issues

title: 52 Pick-up
description: Song titles that include a card value (i.e. 2-10, jack, queen, king, or ace) or a card suit (hearts, diamonds, spades, or clubs)(Plurals don't have to match)

title: Censor This, Please
description: Songs with expletives (PG and up) in the title.

title: Legally Dubious
description: Songs about committing crimes (felonies or misdemeanors)
